text: ॐṃṃśri-paramātmane namah, athadviti-yodhyāyaḥ, sāṅkhya-yogah, sanjaya-uvācya, tamta-thākṛpāya-viṣṭam, asśra-purnāku lekshanam, viṣi-dantamidam vākyam, uvācama dhusudanah, śrībhagavānuvāc, kutastvā kashmalamidam, viṣame samupasthitam, ānār yajoshta maśvarjam, ākīrtikaram arjuna, klaibyam āsmagam afpārtha, naetatvayupapadhyate, kṣudram hrdaya dār balyam, tyaktvo tishtha parantapa, arjuna uvācya, katham bhishmamaḥam sanjhe, dronam ca madhusudanah, isṣu bhif pratiyot siyāmi, pujār havarisudanā, gurūna hattvāhi māhānu bhāvān, śreyobhok tumbhaykṣyam apīhaloke, hattvārtha kāmāṁstu gurūni haiva, bhunjīya bhogān, rūdhira pradigdhān, na chaitad vidmahkataranno gariyah, yad dvājaya maya dīvāno jayuhu, yāne vahatvānaji jīvīśāmah, tevasthitāf premukhe dhārtarāśraḥ, kārpanya dosho pātasvabhābhā, prachāmi tvaṁ dharma sammūdha ketā, yachre yasyāniṣchitam brūhitane, śeshyaste ham shādhi māṁ tvaṁ prapannam, naihi prapashyāmi māpān uddhāt, yachchokam uchchokshanam indriyānāṁ, avāpya bhūmā vasapatnam raddham, rājyaṁ surāṇāma pichādhi patyam, sanjaya uvāche eva muktvāhrśri keśam, guḍā keśaṁ parantapah, naiyotsya iti govindam, huktvātushni bhabhuvah, tamuvāche harśri keśah, prahasanivābhāratah senayor ubhayormadhye, vishīdantam idam vachah, śrī bhagavānuvāche, asho chyānan vaso chastvam, prajñāvādāṁ ścabhāśase, gatā suṅagatā suṁścā, nānusho chanti panditā, nattvāham jātunāsam, nattvam neme janādhi pāha, nācchai vanabhavishyāmaha, sarvevayam tāfparam, dehino sminyathā deh, kau māram yauvanam jara, tathā dehāntara prapti hi, dhiras tattra namuhyati, mātras parśāstukunteya, shītoshna sukha dukhdāha, āgam āpāyino nityāha, tāṁstri tikṣa svabhārata, yam hi navyatā yanti ete, purushaṁ purusharśabhā, samadukha sukham dhiram, somratatvāya kalpate, nāsato vidyate bhāvaha, nābhavo vidyate sataha, ubhāyōrapidrushtontaha, tvanayostattva dharishivihi, avināśitutad vidhī, yena sarvamidam tatam, vināśam avyayasyāsya, nakashchitkartum arhati, antavanta ime deha, nityas yokta sharirna, anāśino prameasyā, tasmādhyudhyasvabhārata, yainam vethi hantāram, yashchainam manyate hatam, ubhāo tāu navijāni taha, nāyam hanti nāhanyate, nājāyate mriyate vākadāśit, nāyam bhūtvā bhavitā vāna bhūya, ajō nit yashāśvatō yam purāna, nāhanyate hanyamāne sarīre, vedā vināśinam nit yam, yainam ajam avyayam, kathamsa puruśa phārtha, kamghātayati hanti kam, vāsāmsi jīrnāni yathā vihāya, nāvāni granhāti nāro parāṇi, tathāśri rāni vihāya jīrnāni, ānyāni samyāti nāvāni dehī, nāyam chindan tīśastrāni, nāyam dhāti pāvaka ha, nāchainam kledayantyāpaha, nāśoshrayati marutah, āchē dhyo yam adāhyo yam, ākledyososhya eva ca, nitya sarvagatāsthānu hu, āchalo yam sanātana ha, avyakto yam achintyō yam, avikār dhyo yam ujjate, tasmāde vam viditvainam, nānusho chitum marhasi, āchainam nitya jātam, nityam vāmanya se mṛtam, tathā pitvam mahābāho, nai vam sho chitum marhasi, jātas yai hidhruvomratyoh, dhruvam janma mṛtas yai ca, tasmāda parihār yērthe, nathvam sho chitum marhasi, avyakta dīni bhūtāni, vyakta madhyāni bārata, avyakta nidhanān yevā, tattra ka paridevana, āścarya vat paśyati kaścide nam, āścarya vat vadatitat hai va chānyaha, āścarya vat caīna manyaśrūnoti, śrutva pēnam vedan caīva kashchit, dehi nityama vadhyo yam, dehi sarvasya bārata, tasmāt sarvāni bhūtāni, nathvam sho chitum marhasi, svadhar mam api ca vēkṣhya, nāvyikampi tum marhasi, dharm yādhi yuddhā trē yōn yate, kṣetri yas yana vidyate, yadre chaya chōpa pannam, svargad dvaram pāvratam, sukhi nāha kṣetri yāv pārtha, labhante yuddhā mīdrīṣam, ātha chetvam imam dharm yam, sangrāmam nakarishyasi, tathasvadhar mam kīrtim ca, hitvā pāpama vāpsyasi, ākīrtim ca pībhūtāni, kathayashyanti devyayam, sambhāvitas yacākīrti hi, maranādati rīcchya te, bhajādrānādu paratam, mam sianti tvā mārathā, yesām chetvam bhāhumatā, bhūtvā yas yasi lāgavam, avācchya vādāṁś ca bhūn, vādesyanti tvāhitā, nindantāstava samarthyam, tato dukhatar amnukim, hāto vāpāpāpsiasi svargam, jitvā vā bhokṣya se mahīm, tasmādut tishthakum te ya, yoddhāya krita nishchaya, sukha dukhke samikrita, lābhā lābhau jaya jayao, tato yuddhāya yujyesvā, nai vampa pa māvāpsiasi, īśāte bhīta sāṅkhye, buddhir yoga etri māṃśraṇu, buddhyā yukto yaya pārtha, karma bantham prahasiasi, neha bhikram anāśosti, pratyavā yo na vidyate, svalpa ma pyaśya dharmasya, trāyate mahato bhayāt, vyavasā yātmika buddhi hi, ekhe ha kurunandana, bhauśākhā hianantāśca, buddhyā yo vyavasā yināṃ, yāmi māṃ puśpitaṃ vācam, pravadantya vypashchitaḥ, vedavādara tāvpārtha, nānyadāstīti vādinaḥ, kāmāt māna svarga parāḥ, janma karma phalā pradāṃ, kriyā viśeṣa bhulāṃ, bhogaśvaryag atimprati, bhogaśvaryag prasaktā nāṃ, tayā pārtha cetasāṃ, vyavasā yātmika buddhi hi, samādhau na vidyate, trai gunya visaya vedāḥ, nāṃ trai gunya bhavārjuna, nirdvāndvo nityasatvasthhā, nirjogakṣe mātmavan, yāvāna rtha uddapaṇa, sarvatas samplu todake, tāvāna sarvesu vedeshu, brahmanasya vyjānaṃ, karman ye vādhi ka arste māphale shukad āchana mā karma phalahetur bhūhu Māte sangostva karmaṇi, yogaṣṭhakuru karmaṇi, sangam tyaktvādha-nanjaya, siddhya-siddhya-samo bhūtva, samatvam yoga ujjya te, dure-nahya-varam karma, buddhi-yoga-dha-nanjaya, buddhau-sarana-man vichha, krpana-fphalahetavaha, buddhi-yogto jahatiha, ube-sukrta-dushkrate, tasma-dhiyoga-yayu-jya-sva, yoga-karmasukau-shalam, karma-jam buddhi-yogta hi, phalam tyaktvā mani-śinaha, janma-bandhavi-nirmukta-ha, padam-gacchan-tyanāmayam, yadā-tē-moha-kali-lam, buddhirvya-ti-tari-śyati, tadā-gantāsi-nirvedam, śrūtav-yasyashrūtasyaja, śrūti-vi-pratipanāte, yadā-sthāsyati-nishchala, samādhā-vachala-buddhi-hi, tadā-yogam-vāpsiasi, arjuna-uvācya, sthīta-pregnyasya-kābhāśa, samādhīsthasyake-śavā, sthīta-dhīkh-kīm-prābhāśeta, kīmāsi-tavvra-jeta-kīm, śrībhāgavā-nuvācya, prajā-hāti-yadā-kāmān, sarvān-pārth-manugatān, ātman-yāvātmanātushta-hā, sthīta-pregnyasya-tādhūcchayate, dukh-khēś-vanu-dvīg-namanā-hā, sukheśu-vigatāsprīhā, vītā-rāgabhā-yakrodhā, sthīta-dhīr-munirūcchayate, yasar-vatrā-nabhi-sne-hā, tatt-tāpya-śubhā-śubhāṁ nābhinandati-nadvēṣṭi, tasyapregnyā-prateśthītā, yadā-sambhārate-chāyam, kur-monga-nī-vāsar-vashā, indri-yāṇī-indriyār-the-bhārth-tasya-pregnyā-prateśthītā, vishayā-vini-vartante, nirāhārasya-dehina-hā, rasavar-jam-raso-pyaśyā, parandrashtvā-nivartate, yadā-tohyapikonte-ya, purushasya-vipashchita-hā, indri-yāṇī-pramāthīnī, harante-prasabhā-manahā, tāni-sar-vāni-sam-yam-yā, yukta-āsīt-mat-para-hā, vashay-yās-yāndri-yāṇī-tasya-pregnyā-prateśthītā, dhyāyato-vishayā-an-pumsahā, sangaste-shūpajāyate, sangāt-sanjāyate-kāmahā, kāmāt-krodho-bhījāyate, krodhāt-bhavati-samo-hā-hā, sammo-hāt-smṛti-vibhram-hā, smṛti-bhramsāt-buddhi-nāśahā, buddhi-nāśāt-pranashyati, rāgad-dveshavi-yukta-i-stu, vishayā-nindri-yāścara-an, ātmavashya-irvide-yātmā, prasādha-madhigachati, prasāde-sarva-dukhā-nāṁ hāni-rasyopajāyate, prasannā-ceta-sohyāśu, buddhīv-parjavate-śthate, nāsthi-buddhi-rayuktasyā, nācā-yuktasyā bhāvana, nācā bhāvayatasyānti-hi, āśāntasyā-kūtasyukham, indri-yāṇāṁ hi-cara-tāṁ yān-mano-nu-vidhīyate, tadasyā-hara-ti-pregnāṁ vāyur-nāvami-vāṁ bhasi, tasmā-dhyasyamā-bāho-nigre-hītāni-sarvashah, indri-yāṇī-indriyār-the-bhyah, tasya-pregnā-prateśthita-yān-iśā-sarva-bhūtā-nāṁ tasyāṁ jagarti-samyami-yasyāṁ jagrati-bhūtāni, sāni-śā-pashya-tomune-he, āpūr-jamanam-acalap-prateśtham, samudra-māpav-previ-śanti-yadvat, tadvat-kāmāyam-previ-śanti-sarve, sāśānti-māpnoti-nākā-makāmi, vihāyakā-mānyas-sarvān, pūmāṁś-caraṁ tī-nī-sprhā-hā-nirmamo-nī-rāhankā-rāhā, sāśānti-mādhi-gacchati, āśā-bhrāṁhi-sthiti-vpārthā, nāināṁ prapyavimuhyati, sthitvās-yāmantaka-lepi, brahmā-nirvāna-mṛcchati, ām-tatsaditi, śrīmad-bhagavad-gītāsu, upanishatsu, brahmā-vidyāyā, yoga-śāstra-śrikṣṇār-jūna-sambhāde, sāṅkhya-yogo-nāmā-vidyayāya,
